mapper.sql:
WHERE 1 = 1
AND (recrut_title LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR company_nm LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
AND (
region_nm LIKE '%' + #{rgn} + '%'
)
AND jobs_cd IN
#{code}
AND career IN
N'신입' N'경력'
AND emp_tp_cd = #{empTp, jdbcType=INTEGER}
AND sal_tp_nm =
N'일급' N'시급' N'월급' N'연봉' sal_tp_nm
AND (min_sal IS NULL OR min_sal >= #{minPay})
AND (max_sal IS NULL OR max_sal <= #{maxPay})
AND min_edubg IN
#{edu}
AND reg_dt >=
CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) DATEADD(DAY, -7, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) DATEADD(DAY, -14, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) DATEADD(MONTH, -1, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))
AND holiday_tp_nm LIKE
'%5일%' '%6일%' '%격주%' '%기타%'
mapper.select:
SELECT wanted_auth_no AS wantedAuthNo, recrut_title AS recrutTitle, company_nm AS compNm, ISNULL(sal_tp_nm, '') AS salTpNm, ISNULL(sal_desc, '') AS salNm, ISNULL(emp_tp_nm, '') AS empTpNm, ISNULL(region_nm, '') AS regionNm, ISNULL(jobs_nm, '') AS occNm, ISNULL(holiday_tp_nm, '') AS holidayTpNm, ISNULL(min_edubg, '') AS eduNm, ISNULL(career, '') AS career, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), reg_dt, 23) AS wantedAuthDt, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), close_dt, 23) AS closeDate, ISNULL(wanted_info_url, '') AS wantedInfoUrl FROM J_참여자관리_JOB_POSTING
ORDER BY
reg_dt ASC reg_dt DESC
OFFSET (#{startPage} - 1) * #{display} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{display} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: MERGE INTO J_참여자관리_JOB_POSTING AS target USING ( SELECT #{wantedAuthNo} AS wanted_auth_no, #{companyNm} AS company_nm, #{bizRegNo} AS biz_reg_no, #{indTpNm} AS ind_tp_nm, #{recrutTitle} AS recrut_title, #{jobsCd, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS jobs_cd, #{jobsNm} AS jobs_nm, #{empTpCd, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS emp_tp_cd, #{empTpNm} AS emp_tp_nm, #{salTpNm} AS sal_tp_nm, #{salDesc} AS sal_desc, #{minSal, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS min_sal, #{maxSal, jdbcType=INTEGER} AS max_sal, #{minEdubg} AS min_edubg, #{maxEdubg} AS max_edubg, #{career} AS career, #{holidayTpNm} AS holiday_tp_nm, #{regionNm} AS region_nm, #{zipCd} AS zip_cd, #{strtNmAddr} AS strt_nm_addr, #{basicAddr} AS basic_addr, #{detailAddr} AS detail_addr, CAST(#{regDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DATE) AS reg_dt, CAST(#{closeDt, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DATE) AS close_dt, #{infoSvc} AS info_svc, #{wantedInfoUrl} AS wanted_info_url, #{mobileInfoUrl} AS mobile_info_url, CAST(#{smodifyDtm, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AS DATETIME) AS smodify_dtm, #{syncDtm} AS sync_dtm ) AS source ON target.wanted_auth_no = source.wanted_auth_no WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET company_nm = source.company_nm, biz_reg_no = source.biz_reg_no, ind_tp_nm = source.ind_tp_nm, recrut_title = source.recrut_title, jobs_cd = source.jobs_cd, jobs_nm = source.jobs_nm, emp_tp_cd = source.emp_tp_cd, emp_tp_nm = source.emp_tp_nm, sal_tp_nm = source.sal_tp_nm, sal_desc = source.sal_desc, min_sal = source.min_sal, max_sal = source.max_sal, min_edubg = source.min_edubg, max_edubg = source.max_edubg, career = source.career, holiday_tp_nm = source.holiday_tp_nm, region_nm = source.region_nm, zip_cd = source.zip_cd, strt_nm_addr = source.strt_nm_addr, basic_addr = source.basic_addr, detail_addr = source.detail_addr, reg_dt = source.reg_dt, close_dt = source.close_dt, info_svc = source.info_svc, wanted_info_url = source.wanted_info_url, mobile_info_url = source.mobile_info_url, smodify_dtm = source.smodify_dtm, sync_dtm = source.sync_dtm WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( wanted_auth_no, company_nm, biz_reg_no, ind_tp_nm, recrut_title, jobs_cd, jobs_nm, emp_tp_cd, emp_tp_nm, sal_tp_nm, sal_desc, min_sal, max_sal, min_edubg, max_edubg, career, holiday_tp_nm, region_nm, zip_cd, strt_nm_addr, basic_addr, detail_addr, reg_dt, close_dt, info_svc, wanted_info_url, mobile_info_url, smodify_dtm, sync_dtm, detail_fetched ) VALUES ( source.wanted_auth_no, source.company_nm, source.biz_reg_no, source.ind_tp_nm, source.recrut_title, source.jobs_cd, source.jobs_nm, source.emp_tp_cd, source.emp_tp_nm, source.sal_tp_nm, source.sal_desc, source.min_sal, source.max_sal, source.min_edubg, source.max_edubg, source.career, source.holiday_tp_nm, source.region_nm, source.zip_cd, source.strt_nm_addr, source.basic_addr, source.detail_addr, source.reg_dt, source.close_dt, source.info_svc, source.wanted_info_url, source.mobile_info_url, source.smodify_dtm, source.sync_dtm, 0 );
mapper.select: SELECT TOP (#{limit}) wanted_auth_no FROM J_참여자관리_JOB_POSTING WHERE detail_fetched = 0 ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE J_참여자관리_JOB_POSTING SET detail_fetched = 1, sync_dtm_detail = GETDATE(), jobs_nm = #{jobsNm, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, reper_nm = #{reperNm, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, tot_psncnt = #{totPsncnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, capital_amt = #{capitalAmt, jdbcType=BIGINT}, yr_sales_amt = #{yrSalesAmt, jdbcType=BIGINT}, busi_cont = #{busiCont, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, home_pg = #{homePg, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, busi_size = #{busiSize, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, recrut_peri = #{recrutPeri, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, recruit_cnt = #{recrutPcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, rel_jobs_nm = #{relJobsNm, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, job_cont = #{jobCont, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, for_lang = #{forLang, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, major = #{major, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, certificate = #{certificate, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, mltsvc_exc_hope = #{mltsvcExcHope, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, comp_abl = #{compAbl, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, pref_cond = #{prefCond, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, sel_mthd = #{selMthd, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, rcpt_mthd = #{rcptMthd, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, submit_doc = #{submitDoc, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, etc_hope_cont = #{etcHopeCont, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, near_line = #{nearLine, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, work_time_cont = #{workTimeCont, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, four_ins = #{fourIns, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, retire_pay = #{retirePay, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, welfare_desc = #{welfareDesc, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, disable_cvntl = #{disableCvntl, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, enter_tp_cd_detail= #{enterTpCdDetail, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sal_tp_cd = #{salTpCd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, keyword_list = #{keywordList, jdbcType=NVARCHAR} WHERE wanted_auth_no = #{wantedAuthNo}
